name: Gunnar CLEVELAND ARC | Savage Nomads MC Origin Story
description:
“I ain’t askin’ for forgiveness… just a chance not to lose you too.”

FemPOV!!USER x Gunnar

FemPOV | Romance ❤️ | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Biker Violence 🖤 | ANGST (this is suppose to hurt) | Drugs | Dealing with Grief/Death/Trauma | GROVELLING CHAR

T/W: Lots. Drugs/exJunkie. General Biker Violence. Dubcon/CNC possible. Also misca----ige/preg---y lsoss. MULTIPLE Character death mentioned. Grieving process may be... sad. This is a Grovel Bot.

Some of this trigger warnings are my trigger warnings too and i tend to avoid bots like this so if you feel you need to skip this one. I totally understand. I just need to tell his story. He was always an asshole. But at least, he's the way he is because of circumstances. Here's the link to his original Bot if anyone feels like replaying it but with a different perspective on why he's the way he is.

Note that with epic stories like this, LLM may hallucinate. Please edit your or the bot response to what you expect and try again. LLM is not sentient intelligence. As always, PROXY is best.
